title: Party Plates Cups and Napkins Set, Includes 7 inch/18cm & 9 inch/23cm Black and White Paper Plates, Serving for 25 Guests, Perfect for Parties Events and Celebrations
features: Complete Party Set for 25 Guests-This PHUNAT Party Set includes: 25pcs 7-inch (18cm) paper plates , 25pcs 9-inch (23cm) paper plates, 25pcs paper napkins, 25pcs paper cups and 25pcs straws.

Classic Black & White Paper Plate Tableware Set–Featuring elegant black-and-white plates with shimmering gold foil scalloped edges, this set brings timeless sophistication to any occasion. The matching cups, napkins, and straws complete the look with a crisp, stylish aesthetic, making it the ideal choice for themed parties, weddings, or upscale celebrations.

Durable and High-Quality Materials-Made from sturdy, food-safe paper materials, the plates and cups are designed to hold food and drinks securely, while the soft, absorbent napkins ensure mess-free enjoyment.
Perfect for Any Celebration-Ideal for birthdays, baby showers, weddings, anniversaries, or any festive event, this set adds a touch of elegance and convenience to your party planning.
Eco-Friendly, Easy Cleanup and lightweight features makes post-party cleanup a breeze, allowing you to focus on enjoying your event without the hassle of washing dishes.
